summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 4-part marketplace enhancement: Social engagement notifications, Listing detail with photo gallery and shipping estimate, Buy It Now/Add to Cart with guest checkout, and Seller dashboard Orders tab. Fixed 2 MongoDB ObjectId serialization bugs in comment endpoints. All 21 backend tests pass, all frontend features verified.

fixed_during_testing.issue: MongoDB projection mixing inclusion/exclusion causing 500 error
MongoDB _id ObjectId not JSON serializable causing 520 error

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 marketplace enhancement features are working: 1) Social notifications (like/share/comment) trigger notifications to sellers, 2) Listing detail has photo gallery with zoom/pan (when images exist) and shipping estimator using Shippo API, 3) Add to Cart buttons on marketplace cards and listing detail with localStorage persistence, 4) Guest checkout flow with 3 steps (Cart/Shipping/Payment), Seller dashboard has Orders tab. Shippo API is in test mode returning real test rates. Digital goods skip shipping calculation.

backend_apis.shippo_estimate: Returns real test rates or requires_seller_info
backend_apis.like_endpoint: Requires auth, toggles like, notifies seller
backend_apis.comment_endpoint: Requires auth, creates comment, notifies seller
